basic_details.job_title: MSEFC Tarn Taran Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Legal Consultant, HR Office Secretarial Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Micro and Small Enterprises Facilitation Council Tarn Taran (MSEFC Tarn Taran)
basic_details.short_information: Micro and Small Enterprises Facilitation Council Tarn Taran (MSEFC Tarn Taran) has released the MSEFC Tarn Taran Recruitment 2026 notification for 3 contractual posts including Legal Consultant and HR (Office/Secretarial). This latest Punjab recruitment drive offers opportunities for candidates looking for legal and office administration jobs through email application mode.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Law Graduate with minimum 50% marks, Graduate in any discipline
qualification.details: Legal Consultant: Law Graduate from a recognized Institute/University with a minimum of 50% marks. Minimum 2 years of legal work experience, including 1 year in MSME disputes/arbitration/mediation. Good drafting skills, proficiency in English & Punjabi, MS Office. HR (Office/Secretarial): Graduate in any discipline from a recognized University/Board. 2 years of experience in data entry, computer skills, internet, Excel.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications and documents Merit based on academic performance Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MSEFC Tarn Taran recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the MSEFC Tarn Taran recruitment is 15-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Legal Consultant and HR posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies, with 1 for the Legal Consultant post and 2 for the HR (Office/Secretarial) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Legal Consultant position?
faq.answer: For the Legal Consultant position, you need to be a Law Graduate with a minimum of 50% marks and have at least 2 years of legal work experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will range from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via Email.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, merit based on academic performance, and an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
